reviews.review_description: Even though now that I'm writing this the game has many bugs It's still a grate game. It has many monsters. It's too scary for me and I hope this game gets more players because I'm lonely 🥺😭. I think that if this game got more players it would be twice as fun. There's a major bug and thats LAG I hate the lag but if they fix it I will play it more.I think that the trees and leaves cause the LAG Because evety time I look at the trees my game lags. It has a nice radar that shows you how close the monsters are. In my opinion there should be less monsters or bigger maze. 😉
